name: Waiver of Termination Assessment for Departing Citizens

eligibility.description: U.S. citizens or citizens of U.S. possessions who are departing the country and can demonstrate that such departure does not prejudice tax collection.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: The Secretary has the discretion to waive the requirements of a termination assessment for U.S. citizens about to depart the United States, preventing the immediate acceleration of tax liability.
